title: Semi-Supervised and Transfer Learning-Based Smart Contract Vulnerability Detection
data:
H Song, Y Wang, H Yu, L Ma, S Jiang- IEEE Transactions on Dependable and, 2026
Smart contracts are crucial for managing sensitive financial transactions. However, 
these contracts are inherently vulnerable which can cause significant security risks.

title: On Data Engineering for Scaling LLM Terminal Capabilities
data:
R Pi, G Lam, M Shoeybi, P Jannaty, B Catanzaro- arXiv preprint arXiv, 2026
Despite rapid recent progress in the terminal capabilities of large language models, 
the training data strategies behind state-of-the-art terminal agents remain largely
